option.name: originalContent
option.value:
PORT=4000 HOST=0.0.0.0 APP_NAME=CryptoBot Prime AUTH_HASH_SECRET=change-this-secret OTP_TTL_MINUTES=10 RESET_TOKEN_TTL_MINUTES=15 SESSION_TTL_DAYS=30
# For Brevo SMTP testing: # SMTP_HOST=smtp-relay.brevo.com # SMTP_PORT=587 # SMTP_USER=your-brevo-smtp-login-email # SMTP_PASS=your-brevo-smtp-key # SMTP_FROM=CryptoBot Prime <your-verified-sender@example.com> # DEV_RETURN_OTP_IN_RESPONSE=true # Important: # - SMTP_PASS must be a Brevo SMTP key, not your Brevo account password or API key. # - SMTP_FROM must be a verified sender email or a sender from an authenticated domain.
# For Gmail app-password testing: # SMTP_HOST=smtp.gmail.com # SMTP_PORT=587 # SMTP_USER=yourgmail@gmail.com # SMTP_PASS=your-16-character-app-password # SMTP_FROM=CryptoBot Prime <yourgmail@gmail.com>
# Browser web app can use localhost. # Mobile app should use your PC/LAN IP (same Wi-Fi), e.g. http://192.168.0.121:4000 VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4000
# Google sign-in: # VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=your-google-web-client-id.apps.googleusercontent.com # GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=your-google-web-client-id.apps.googleusercontent.com # GOOGLE_CLIENT_IDS=optional-extra-client-id.apps.googleusercontent.com # VITE_PUBLIC_AUTH_BASE_URL=https://your-public-ngrok-or-cloudflare-url # VITE_NATIVE_AUTH_CALLBACK_URL=cryptobotprime://auth-callback

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
PORT=4000 HOST=0.0.0.0 APP_NAME="CryptoBot Prime" AUTH_HASH_SECRET=change-this-secret OTP_TTL_MINUTES=10 RESET_TOKEN_TTL_MINUTES=15 SESSION_TTL_DAYS=30
# For Brevo SMTP testing: # SMTP_HOST=smtp-relay.brevo.com # SMTP_PORT=587 # SMTP_USER=your-brevo-smtp-login-email # SMTP_PASS=your-brevo-smtp-key # SMTP_FROM=CryptoBot Prime <your-verified-sender@example.com> # DEV_RETURN_OTP_IN_RESPONSE=true # Important: # - SMTP_PASS must be a Brevo SMTP key, not your Brevo account password or API key. # - SMTP_FROM must be a verified sender email or a sender from an authenticated domain.
# For Gmail app-password testing: # SMTP_HOST=smtp.gmail.com # SMTP_PORT=587 # SMTP_USER=yourgmail@gmail.com # SMTP_PASS=your-16-character-app-password # SMTP_FROM=CryptoBot Prime <yourgmail@gmail.com>
# Browser web app can use localhost during local development. # If the frontend is deployed on Vercel, `VITE_API_BASE_URL` must point to a separately deployed public HTTPS backend. # Mobile app should use your PC/LAN IP (same Wi-Fi), e.g. http://192.168.0.121:4000 VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4000
# Google sign-in: # VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=your-google-web-client-id.apps.googleusercontent.com # GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=your-google-web-client-id.apps.googleusercontent.com # GOOGLE_CLIENT_IDS=optional-extra-client-id.apps.googleusercontent.com # VITE_PUBLIC_AUTH_BASE_URL=https://your-public-ngrok-or-cloudflare-url # VITE_NATIVE_AUTH_CALLBACK_URL=cryptobotprime://auth-callback

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
